Name: MMOSkillStationsPack
Description: MMO Skill Tree - interactive work stations. Ships the Sawmill: press use to saw logs into planks in a diegetic third-person work loop, earning passive Woodcutting + Crafting XP, tool-power-scaled, with luck-tiered bonus loot. Adds the station content, the in-world block, and the sawing loop's flavor assets. The station engine ships in the MMO Skill Tree jar; stations are dormant without this pack.
